title: Verify Experiment Targeting Cohort Logic
description: Tests the core condition for entering the 'Trial Corner' experiment: user does not start consumption within 5 minutes of trial activation.
preconditions: Two new users are created to start a trial.

steps.description: 1. User A: Start the trial and immediately start watching any content for more than 10 seconds (within the first 5 minutes).
2. User B: Start the trial and do not watch any content for at least 6 minutes.
3. For User A, navigate the app and verify the 'Trial Corner' widget/pill does NOT appear.
4. For User B, navigate to the homepage and verify the 'Trial Corner' widget DOES appear.

expected_result: Only User B, who did not consume content, is assigned to the Trial Corner experiment. User A sees the standard trial experience.
